data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Deposit collection vs full payment'. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the outcome of this scenario or any related checks that would allow for a definitive conclusion. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific validations or results related to this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of scenario outcome validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for scenario validation
